prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年最低位次约9784→9768→9671→9268→10251，整体在9200-10300区间波动；2024年曾回升至9268，但2025年大幅后移至10251，近一年后移约983名，波 动幅度较大；该校在天津综合类招生计划2021年131人、2022年128人、2023年130人、2024年127人、2025年126人，呈小幅递减趋势；2026年计划131人， 较2025年增加5人，扩招约4%，对竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名约第110名左右，近年排名稳定在100-113区间，属中上水平理工 类院校；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第50位（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，反映报考关注度尚可；以交通运输工程、船舶与海洋工程等海事特色学科见长，但第五轮学科评估中未出现A-及以上等级学科，学科精度一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类 、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏热；天津市2026年高考考生总数约82000人（含不确定标注），较2025年71938人增加约14%，竞争显著加剧；该校位于辽宁省大连市，在天津市招生计划约130人左右，属跨省招生；天津考生对东北地区高校接受度一般，无明显地域偏 好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+5人）以及天津市考生总数显著增加（+14%）等因素，扩招缓解效应不足以抵消考生规模扩大带 来的竞争加剧；预计2026年最低录取位次约10465名，区间9965-10965名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术等）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程、光电信息科学与工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化、测控技术与仪器）
- 人工智能
- 海事管理
- 交通管理。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 环境科学与工程类（环境工程、海洋科学、海洋资源与环境）
- 工商管理类（工商管理、财务管理）
- 金融工程
- 管理科学与工程类（信息管理与信息系统、大数据管理与应用、电子商务）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约10465名，区间9965-10965名。位次在区间中段（约10400-10600）建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次优于区间下限（约10000以内）可重点 冲刺计算机类、电子信息类等热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（约10900以上）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入该校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking approximately changed from 9784 → 9768 → 9671 → 9268 → 10251, fluctuating within the 9200-10300 range; in 2024 it rebounded to 9268, but in 2025 it significantly dropped to 10251, a backward shift of about 983 places in the past year, with considerable volatility; the comprehensive enrollment plan in Tianjin was 131 in 2021, 128 in 2022, 130 in 2023, 127 in 2024, and 126 in 2025, showing a slight decreasing trend; the 2026 plan is 131, an increase of 5 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 4%, slightly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked around 110th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, stable in the 100-113 range in recent years, belonging to upper-middle level science and engineering institutions; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 50th (relatively hot), with medium-high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting moderate application attention; known for maritime specialties such as transportation engineering and ship and ocean engineering, but no A- or above disciplines appeared in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, indicating average disciplinary precision.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information, and electrical engineering remain socially popular; the total number of Tianjin college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 82,000 (including uncertain marks), an increase of about 14% compared to 71,938 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Dalian, Liaoning Province, with an enrollment plan of about 130 in Tianjin, making it a cross-provincial enrollment; Tianjin examinees have average acceptance of universities in Northeast China, with no obvious regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 plan (+5 students), and the notable increase in Tianjin examinees (+14%), the mitigating effect of expansion is insufficient to offset the intensified competition from the larger candidate pool; the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 10,465, with a range of 9,965 to 10,965.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Law
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instrumentation)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Maritime Management
- Traffic Management
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Marine Science, Marine Resources and Environment)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Financial Management)
- Financial Engineering
- Management Science and Engineering (Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application, E-commerce)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 10,465, range 9,965-10,965. For rankings in the middle of the range (about 10,400-10,600), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as reach and Tier 3 as safety; for rankings better than the lower limit (about 10,000 or less), focus on reaching for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; for rankings near the upper limit (about 10,900 or above), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to secure admission.
